{{Quote|Welcome to Issue #1. Turn the page to find out more about Luke Skywalker on Tatooine.|C-3PO, ''Star Wars Kids'' 1 introduction|<ref name="SWK1" />}}
'''''Star Wars Kids'' 1''' is the premiere issue of [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[September]] [[1997]]. Issue 1 included part one of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[The Rebel Thief]]'', written by [[Ryder Windham]].

''Star Wars Kids'' 1 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 1 came packaged with the ''Star Wars Missions'' starter kit, which also included the game's first adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 1: Assault on Yavin Four|''Assault on Yavin Four'']].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"Ask R2-D2 About the Prequels"
*"Yoda's Puzzle Pages"
*"[[Meet...|Meet Luke Skywalker]]" — [[Mark Hamill]] tells ''Star Wars Kids'' what it's like to be Luke!
*"A-maze-ing Universe"
*"Who Does That?" — [[Ben Burtt|Meet the man]] who made Chewbacca growl and Luke's lightsaber hum
*"Poster Pull-Out"
*"On Our Planet"
*"Brain Blasters"
*"''Star Wars'' Missions"
*"Space Science"
*"[[The Rebel Thief]]" Part 1 {{C|by [[Ryder Windham]]}}
